### SCHEMA FOR dw.fact_waste_generation ###
('sk_proyecto', 'bigint', None)
('waste_generator_key', 'bigint', None)
('sk_tiempo', 'bigint', None)
('waste_type_key', 'bigint', None)
('dangerous_waste_key', 'bigint', None)
('danger_class_key', 'bigint', None)
('geo_location_key', 'bigint', None)
('quantity_generated', 'numeric', None)
('quantity_delivered', 'numeric', None)
('quantity_stored', 'numeric', None)
('unit', 'character varying', 50)
('record_year', 'integer', None)
